array.string:
Run the full Friday wiki maintenance cycle:
1. Check ~/work-brain/raw/ for unprocessed items (exclude processed/). If there are items, run the work-brain-ingest skill: read each item, create source notes, and PROPOSE concept/entity notes by posting proposals to #claude-phil (C0AP3B1EQK0) for Phil's review.
2. Run the work-brain-lint skill: scan all wiki files, find orphans/broken links/gaps/stale notes, compress sessions/current-week.md, regenerate index.md, reindex semantic search (source ~/work-brain/.venv/bin/activate and python3 ~/work-brain/wiki_search.py reindex).
3. Post the lint report summary to #claude-phil (C0AP3B1EQK0).
4. Update ~/work-brain/log.md with both ingest and lint entries.
Follow all rules in ~/work-brain/README.md. Propose, don't act on canonical content. Privacy rules are absolute.
